title: Trigger not fired under bulk insert
poc: CREATE TABLE t111 (id INT, name VARCHAR(1024));
INSERT INTO t111 SELECT * FROM t111;
key_bug_features: Trigger not firing during bulk insert operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t222 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(1024), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TRIGGER update_name BEFORE INSERT ON t222 FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.name = COALESCE(NEW.name, 'default_name');
INSERT INTO t222 (id, name) SELECT id + 10, name FROM t222 WHERE id < 3;
